Sub-product: General-purpose credit card or charge card
Issue: Problem with a purchase shown on your statement
Sub-issue: Credit card company isn't resolving a dispute about a purchase on your statement
Consumer complaint narrative: I was charged twice for the same purchase on my credit card statement. I contacted the company about the duplicate charge and asked for a refund but they have not resolved this billing dispute. The payment for XXXX is clearly listed two times.

Sub-product: General-purpose credit card or charge card
Consumer complaint narrative: My monthly invoice shows an interest charge that I do not understand. I paid my balance in full last month so this payment fee is incorrect. I want the charge reversed and my billing corrected.
I cannot log in to my online banking account. My password reset email never arrives and my account appears to be locked. I have no access to my own funds and need to regain login access immediately.
The company locked my account with no warning and I cannot access my savings. I need someone to reset my access and restore my login permission.
My mortgage payment was processed but the company applied it to the wrong month. My account billing is now showing a late charge that should not exist. Please correct the payment and refund the fee.

Issue: Attempts to collect debt not owed
Consumer complaint narrative: A collector keeps contacting me about a debt that is not mine. This is unacceptable and I am frustrated. I never opened this account and I want it removed from my record.

Product: Credit reporting, credit repair services, or other personal consumer reports
Consumer complaint narrative: There is incorrect information on my credit report that belongs to someone else. I disputed it but nothing changed. This is the worst experience and I am disappointed in how it was handled.

Product: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service
Sub-issue: App or website does not work
Consumer complaint narrative: The mobile app keeps showing an error and crashes every time I try to send money. The transfer fails and the screen is broken. This looks like an outage on their end and it is urgent because I need to pay rent.

Product: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service
Consumer complaint narrative: I sent a transfer and the system returned a 500 error. The transaction is now stuck and the website is down. I cannot tell if my money was sent.

Issue: Problems at the end of the loan or lease
Sub-issue: Problem with paying off the loan
Consumer complaint narrative: I tried to pay off my auto loan but the payoff invoice amount does not match my balance. There is an extra charge I never agreed to. Please review the billing and refund the difference.

Issue: Dealing with your lender or servicer
Sub-issue: Trouble with how payments are being handled
Consumer complaint narrative: My student loan servicer charged me a payment fee that should not be there. My invoice is wrong and I want the charge refunded. The billing has been a mess for months.
I am locked out of my account again. The reset password feature is broken and gives an error. I need access restored.

Sub-issue: Problem with rewards from credit card

Product: Payday loan, title loan, or personal loan
Issue: Charged fees or interest you didn't expect
Consumer complaint narrative: I was charged a fee I did not expect on my personal loan. The invoice shows a charge that was never disclosed. I want a refund of this payment.

Sub-issue: Didn't receive notice of right to dispute
Consumer complaint narrative: I received a collection notice but no notice of my right to dispute. The whole process is ridiculous and I am angry. I want this corrected.

Issue: Problem caused by your funds being low
Consumer complaint narrative: The bank hit me with an overdraft charge and the fee is unfair. My account billing shows multiple charges in one day. Please refund the overdraft payment.

Product: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service
Consumer complaint narrative: The trading platform is down and I cannot access my account. The site keeps crashing with an error. This is an emergency because prices are moving and I am locked out.

Issue: Applying for a mortgage or refinancing an existing mortgage
Consumer complaint narrative: I am interested in refinancing and would like a quote for a new plan. I tried to upgrade my existing loan but no one followed up. Can someone from sales contact me about a demo of the new rates?

Product: Credit reporting, credit repair services, or other personal consumer reports
Sub-issue: Reporting company used your report improperly
Consumer complaint narrative: A company pulled my credit report without my permission. I never gave access. This is unacceptable and I want to know who authorized it.

Sub-issue: Trouble using the card to spend money in a store or online
Consumer complaint narrative: My prepaid card was declined and the app shows an error every time. The card is broken and I cannot use it. I need this fixed asap.
This collector calls me constantly and it is frustrating. The repeated calls are unacceptable. I have asked them to stop multiple times.

Sub-issue: Didn't receive terms that were advertised

Consumer complaint narrative: I am struggling to repay my loan and asked about options. The invoice keeps growing with charges. I want help with my billing and a payment plan.
My lease billing is wrong. I was charged a payment twice and the invoice does not match my contract. Please refund the duplicate charge.

Product: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service
Issue: Managing, opening, or closing your mobile wallet account
Consumer complaint narrative: I cannot open my wallet account. The login fails and the password reset is broken. I have no access and need someone to unlock it.

Sub-product: General-purpose credit card or charge card
Consumer complaint narrative: They closed my credit card account without notice. I lost access and cannot log in. This is the worst service I have had.
I am behind on my mortgage and the late charges keep stacking up on my invoice. I need help understanding the billing and the refund I was promised.
The collector is trying to collect the wrong amount. The charge they list is not what I owe. This is ridiculous and I am furious about the billing error.
My deposit did not show up and the app threw an error. The system seems down and I cannot access my balance. Please fix this urgently.

Product: Credit reporting, credit repair services, or other personal consumer reports
Issue: Problem with a company's investigation into an existing problem
Sub-issue: Was not notified of investigation status or results
Consumer complaint narrative: I disputed an error and was never told the result. The lack of communication is unacceptable and I am disappointed.

Product: Payday loan, title loan, or personal loan
Issue: Problem with the payoff process at the end of the loan
Consumer complaint narrative: I tried to pay off my title loan and the payoff invoice is wrong. There is a charge I do not recognize. Please review my billing and issue a refund.

Product: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service
Consumer complaint narrative: I just wanted to thank the team. After some confusion my transfer went through fine. No rush on anything, just leaving positive feedback. Whenever someone reads this is fine.
